Star Atlas x DRiP

Drip... Drip... DRiP  

We're collaborating with DRiP to send out some digital gifts, starting with a Legendary by Degen Poet on August 21!  

Want some limited and exclusive Star Atlas themed collectibles? 

Click the link ,Connect your wallet,Press "Enter",Once you're in, make sure you subscribe to Degen Poet for a chance to receive the Legendary,
